text: {"overallConclusion":"Preventive health behaviors improve health outcomes","inferences":[{"type":"supports","premiseIndexes":[0],"conclusionIndex":-1,"warrant":"Empirical studies show that a balanced diet is associated with better health indicators","strength":"moderate","defeaters":["Methodological flaws in the diet studies","Confounding lifestyle factors"]},{"type":"supports","premiseIndexes":[1],"conclusionIndex":-1,"warrant":"Research demonstrates that regular handwashing lowers the transmission rate of many infections","strength":"moderate","defeaters":["Inadequate compliance with handwashing protocols","Alternative transmission pathways dominate in specific contexts"]}]}
